LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-24-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2021 Continued To Nov-10-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-24-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Summary Judgment.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A's unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Counsel for the movant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
